MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via Zoom:
Kristen Dean, Esq., Tel. 916.920.2295, appearing for the plaintiff Cavalry SPV I, LLC as assignee of Citibank, N.A.;
Vish Soroushian, Esq. of Bay Area Legal Aid, Tel. 415.663.4744, appearing (limited scope) for defendant Lien T. Vu.

Hearing re; PLAINTIFF CAVALRY SPV I, LLC AS ASSIGNEE OF CITIBANK, N.A.'S Motion For Order Setting Aside Dismissal Of The Case.

The matter is contested. Argument is held. At the conclusion of argument, the Court takes the matter under submission.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Deputy: Not present. Matter not reported.
